name: RTL ~ Blissfully Unaware
description:
꥟ 💜 Too much Shield... 💜 ꥟

CW: Fat, Kind of Inflation? Weight Gain.

Starting Weight: ~450 lbs.

Gonna keep making these lol, drop ideas in the comments if you have some.

I know no one really cares about Raven Team Leader anymore, but I just thought why not.

If I am asked to delete a Card because an artist requests it, I'll take it down.

Please, give feedback, even if it's a hate comment! 🙂

Also, if the Card repeats itself, or says something really dumb, it is NOT my fault. I've seen so many thumbs down reports from other creators for things that aren't their fault.
creator: skelly1007
